title: Look, I have a spear!
description: This resource pack replaces swords with spears.
body:
The new Minecraft Live showed off spears, but do you really want to wait to use them? Well, this resource pack will replace swords with spears so you can use them right now!

The resource pack will be ported to previous versions. 

Currently the resource pack supports English and Russian language, but I might add more.
